case_title: LAI, YOUNG C. DBA YONG AT HEART VS LAPIN ASSOCIATES DBA THE JEWELRY MART et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, YOUNG C. DBA YONG AT HEART RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAPIN ASSOCIATES DBA THE JEWELRY MART MICHAEL I. BUTLER  PRESIDENT, LAPIN ASSOCIATES BUTLER MICHAEL I. DBA THE JEWELRY MART $1,366.67 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,412.67, PLFT'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE PROPER DEFT LAPIN ASSOCIATES DBA THE JEWELRYMART. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAPIN ASSOCIATES DBA THE JEWELRY MART
DEFT'S ORDERED CONTINUANCE REQUEST FOR 8/7 10AM HR NG "DENIED" BY COMM. SUE KAPLAN.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,366.67 FILED BY LAI, YOUNG C. DBA YONG AT HEART AS TO DEFENDANT LAPIN ASSOCIATES DBA THE JEWELRY MART MICHAEL I. BUTLER  PRESIDENT, LAPIN ASSOCIATES BUTLER MICHAEL I. DBA THE JEWELRY MART ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LAPIN ASSOCIATES DBA THE JEWELRY MART MICHAEL I. BUTLER  PRESIDENT, LAPIN ASSOCIATES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LAI, YOUNG C. DBA YONG AT HEART ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF LAI, YOUNG C. DBA YONG AT HEART

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LAPIN ASSOCIATES DBA THE JEWELRY MART IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LAI, YOUNG C. DBA YONG AT HEART PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. MICHAEL BUTLER IS DISMISSED AS CROSS CLAIMANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
